---
title: "EDA"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
files <- c(
  "20240604-203035-test 89.csv",
  "20240605-214932-CC-07-90.csv",
  "20240605-214932-CC-07-90_gps.csv"
)

for (f in files) {
  cat("\n============================\n")
  cat("File:", f, "\n")
  cat("============================\n")

  df <- read.csv(f, nrows = 5, check.names = FALSE)
  print(names(df))
}
```

```{r}
shark1 <- read.csv("20240604-203035-test 89.csv", check.names = FALSE)
shark2 <- read.csv("20240605-214932-CC-07-90.csv", check.names = FALSE)

dim(shark1)
dim(shark2)

str(shark1)
str(shark2)

head(shark1[, 1:10])
head(shark2[, 1:10])
```

```{r}
na_count1 <- colSums(is.na(shark1))
na_count2 <- colSums(is.na(shark2))

print(na_count1)
print(na_count2)
```

```{r}
unique_count1 <- sapply(shark1, function(x) length(unique(x)))
unique_count2 <- sapply(shark2, function(x) length(unique(x)))

print(unique_count1)
print(unique_count2)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

shark1_clean <- shark1
shark2_clean <- shark2

names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Accelerometer X [m/s\xb2]"] <- "acc_x"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Accelerometer Y [m/s\xb2]"] <- "acc_y"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Accelerometer Z [m/s\xb2]"] <- "acc_z"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Gyroscope X [mrad/s]"] <- "gyro_x"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Gyroscope Y [mrad/s]"] <- "gyro_y"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Gyroscope Z [mrad/s]"] <- "gyro_z"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Magnetometer X [\xb5T]"] <- "mag_x"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Magnetometer Y [\xb5T]"] <- "mag_y"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Magnetometer Z [\xb5T]"] <- "mag_z"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Temperature (imu) [\xb0C]"] <- "temp_imu"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Depth (100bar) 1 [m]"] <- "depth_m"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Depth (100bar) 2 [\xb0C]"] <- "depth_temp"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Light intensity 1 [raw]"] <- "light_1"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "Light intensity 2 [raw]"] <- "light_2"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "BATT [V]"] <- "batt_v"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "BATT [mA]"] <- "batt_ma"
names(shark1_clean)[names(shark1_clean) == "BATT [mAh]"] <- "batt_mah"

names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Accelerometer X [m/s\xb2]"] <- "acc_x"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Accelerometer Y [m/s\xb2]"] <- "acc_y"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Accelerometer Z [m/s\xb2]"] <- "acc_z"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Gyroscope X [mrad/s]"] <- "gyro_x"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Gyroscope Y [mrad/s]"] <- "gyro_y"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Gyroscope Z [mrad/s]"] <- "gyro_z"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Magnetometer X [\xb5T]"] <- "mag_x"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Magnetometer Y [\xb5T]"] <- "mag_y"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Magnetometer Z [\xb5T]"] <- "mag_z"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Temperature (imu) [\xb0C]"] <- "temp_imu"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Depth (200bar) 1 [m]"] <- "depth_m"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Depth (200bar) 2 [\xb0C]"] <- "depth_temp"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Light intensity 1 [raw]"] <- "light_1"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "Light intensity 2 [raw]"] <- "light_2"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "BATT [V]"] <- "batt_v"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "BATT [mA]"] <- "batt_ma"
names(shark2_clean)[names(shark2_clean) == "BATT [mAh]"] <- "batt_mah"

shark1_clean$datetime_local <- as.POSIXct(
  paste(shark1_clean[["Date (local)"]], shark1_clean[["Time (local)"]]),
  format = "%d.%m.%Y %H:%M:%OS"
)

shark2_clean$datetime_local <- as.POSIXct(
  paste(shark2_clean[["Date (local)"]], shark2_clean[["Time (local)"]]),
  format = "%d.%m.%Y %H:%M:%OS"
)

shark1_plot <- shark1_clean[seq(1, nrow(shark1_clean), by = 100), ]
shark2_plot <- shark2_clean[seq(1, nrow(shark2_clean), by = 100), ]

shark1_plot$shark_id <- "Shark 1"
shark2_plot$shark_id <- "Shark 2"

shark1_plot$hours_since_start <- as.numeric(
  difftime(shark1_plot$datetime_local, min(shark1_plot$datetime_local), units = "hours")
)

shark2_plot$hours_since_start <- as.numeric(
  difftime(shark2_plot$datetime_local, min(shark2_plot$datetime_local), units = "hours")
)

combined_depth_relative <- bind_rows(
  shark1_plot[, c("hours_since_start", "depth_m", "shark_id")],
  shark2_plot[, c("hours_since_start", "depth_m", "shark_id")]
)

ggplot(combined_depth_relative, aes(x = hours_since_start, y = depth_m, color = shark_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Depth over Relative Time for Two Sharks",
    x = "Hours Since Start of Recording",
    y = "Depth (m)",
    color = "Shark"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(combined_depth_relative, aes(x = depth_m, fill = shark_id)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, alpha = 0.5, position = "identity") +
  labs(
    title = "Depth Distribution for Two Sharks",
    x = "Depth (m)",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Shark"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(combined_depth_relative, aes(x = shark_id, y = depth_m, fill = shark_id)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Depth Boxplot by Shark",
    x = "Shark",
    y = "Depth (m)",
    fill = "Shark"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
summary(shark1_clean$light_1)
summary(shark2_clean$light_1)

sort(table(shark1_clean$light_1), decreasing = TRUE)[1:10]
sort(table(shark2_clean$light_1), decreasing = TRUE)[1:10]
```

```{r}
combined_light_hist <- bind_rows(
  shark1_plot[, c("light_1", "shark_id")],
  shark2_plot[, c("light_1", "shark_id")]
)

ggplot(combined_light_hist, aes(x = light_1, fill = shark_id)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, alpha = 0.5, position = "identity") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Light Intensity 1 for Two Sharks",
    x = "Light Intensity 1",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Shark"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
summary(shark1_clean$light_2)
summary(shark2_clean$light_2)

sort(table(shark1_clean$light_2), decreasing = TRUE)[1:10]
sort(table(shark2_clean$light_2), decreasing = TRUE)[1:10]

combined_light2_hist <- bind_rows(
  shark1_plot[, c("light_2", "shark_id")],
  shark2_plot[, c("light_2", "shark_id")]
)

ggplot(combined_light2_hist, aes(x = light_2, fill = shark_id)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, alpha = 0.5, position = "identity") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Light Intensity 2 for Two Sharks",
    x = "Light Intensity 2",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Shark"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
combined_temp <- bind_rows(
  shark1_plot[, c("hours_since_start", "depth_temp", "shark_id")],
  shark2_plot[, c("hours_since_start", "depth_temp", "shark_id")]
)

ggplot(combined_temp, aes(x = depth_temp, fill = shark_id)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, alpha = 0.5, position = "identity") +
  labs(
    title = "Water Temperature Distribution for Two Sharks",
    x = "Water Temperature",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Shark"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(combined_temp, aes(x = hours_since_start, y = depth_temp, color = shark_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Water Temperature over Relative Time for Two Sharks",
    x = "Hours Since Start of Recording",
    y = "Water Temperature",
    color = "Shark"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
combined_depth_temp <- bind_rows(
  shark1_plot[, c("depth_m", "depth_temp", "shark_id")],
  shark2_plot[, c("depth_m", "depth_temp", "shark_id")]
)

ggplot(combined_depth_temp, aes(x = depth_m, y = depth_temp, color = shark_id)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.15, size = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "Depth vs Water Temperature for Two Sharks",
    x = "Depth (m)",
    y = "Water Temperature",
    color = "Shark"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
cor_shark1 <- cor(shark1_plot$depth_m, shark1_plot$depth_temp, use = "complete.obs")
cor_shark2 <- cor(shark2_plot$depth_m, shark2_plot$depth_temp, use = "complete.obs")

cor_shark1
cor_shark2
```

```{r}
library(zoo)

roll_n <- 200

shark1_plot$acc_x_static <- zoo::rollmean(shark1_plot$acc_x, k = roll_n, fill = NA, align = "center")
shark1_plot$acc_y_static <- zoo::rollmean(shark1_plot$acc_y, k = roll_n, fill = NA, align = "center")
shark1_plot$acc_z_static <- zoo::rollmean(shark1_plot$acc_z, k = roll_n, fill = NA, align = "center")

shark2_plot$acc_x_static <- zoo::rollmean(shark2_plot$acc_x, k = roll_n, fill = NA, align = "center")
shark2_plot$acc_y_static <- zoo::rollmean(shark2_plot$acc_y, k = roll_n, fill = NA, align = "center")
shark2_plot$acc_z_static <- zoo::rollmean(shark2_plot$acc_z, k = roll_n, fill = NA, align = "center")

shark1_plot$acc_x_dyn <- shark1_plot$acc_x - shark1_plot$acc_x_static
shark1_plot$acc_y_dyn <- shark1_plot$acc_y - shark1_plot$acc_y_static
shark1_plot$acc_z_dyn <- shark1_plot$acc_z - shark1_plot$acc_z_static

shark2_plot$acc_x_dyn <- shark2_plot$acc_x - shark2_plot$acc_x_static
shark2_plot$acc_y_dyn <- shark2_plot$acc_y - shark2_plot$acc_y_static
shark2_plot$acc_z_dyn <- shark2_plot$acc_z - shark2_plot$acc_z_static

shark1_plot$odba <- abs(shark1_plot$acc_x_dyn) + abs(shark1_plot$acc_y_dyn) + abs(shark1_plot$acc_z_dyn)
shark2_plot$odba <- abs(shark2_plot$acc_x_dyn) + abs(shark2_plot$acc_y_dyn) + abs(shark2_plot$acc_z_dyn)
```

```{r}
combined_odba <- bind_rows(
  shark1_plot[, c("hours_since_start", "odba", "shark_id")],
  shark2_plot[, c("hours_since_start", "odba", "shark_id")]
)

ggplot(combined_odba, aes(x = hours_since_start, y = odba, color = shark_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "ODBA over Relative Time for Two Sharks",
    x = "Hours Since Start of Recording",
    y = "ODBA",
    color = "Shark"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
library(zoo)

shark1_plot$odba_smooth <- zoo::rollmean(shark1_plot$odba, k = 50, fill = NA, align = "center")
shark2_plot$odba_smooth <- zoo::rollmean(shark2_plot$odba, k = 50, fill = NA, align = "center")
```

```{r}
ggplot(shark1_plot, aes(x = hours_since_start, y = odba_smooth)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Shark 1: Smoothed ODBA over Relative Time",
    x = "Hours Since Start of Recording",
    y = "Smoothed ODBA"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(shark2_plot, aes(x = hours_since_start, y = odba_smooth)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Shark 2: Smoothed ODBA over Relative Time",
    x = "Hours Since Start of Recording",
    y = "Smoothed ODBA"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
combined_odba_depth <- bind_rows(
  shark1_plot[, c("depth_m", "odba_smooth", "shark_id")],
  shark2_plot[, c("depth_m", "odba_smooth", "shark_id")]
)

ggplot(combined_odba_depth, aes(x = depth_m, y = odba_smooth, color = shark_id)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.15, size = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "Smoothed ODBA vs Depth for Two Sharks",
    x = "Depth (m)",
    y = "Smoothed ODBA",
    color = "Shark"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
install.packages("hexbin")
library(hexbin)
```

```{r}
ggplot(shark1_plot, aes(x = depth_m, y = odba_smooth)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.12, size = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "Shark 1: Smoothed ODBA vs Depth",
    x = "Depth (m)",
    y = "Smoothed ODBA"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(shark2_plot, aes(x = depth_m, y = odba_smooth)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.12, size = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "Shark 2: Smoothed ODBA vs Depth",
    x = "Depth (m)",
    y = "Smoothed ODBA"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(shark1_plot, aes(x = hours_since_start)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = depth_m / max(depth_m, na.rm = TRUE), color = "Depth")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = odba_smooth / max(odba_smooth, na.rm = TRUE), color = "Smoothed ODBA")) +
  labs(
    title = "Shark 1: Relative Depth and Smoothed ODBA over Time",
    x = "Hours Since Start of Recording",
    y = "Scaled Value",
    color = "Variable"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(shark2_plot, aes(x = hours_since_start)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = depth_m / max(depth_m, na.rm = TRUE), color = "Depth")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = odba_smooth / max(odba_smooth, na.rm = TRUE), color = "Smoothed ODBA")) +
  labs(
    title = "Shark 2: Relative Depth and Smoothed ODBA over Time",
    x = "Hours Since Start of Recording",
    y = "Scaled Value",
    color = "Variable"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
